headline: BMO Capital and Morgan Stanley Take Different Views on Healthpeak Properties (DOC)
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 6.07%, Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE:DOC) is included among the 12 Stocks with Highest Dividend to Invest In Now. On June 15, BMO Capital raised its price recommendation on Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE:DOC) to $24 from $20. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the stock as part of a broader research […]

headline: Raymond James Reinstates Market Perform on Healthpeak Properties
summary: Raymond James  analyst David Rodgers   reinstates Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Market Perform.
